learnerValue: Distinguishes the reading and writing demands of Component 01 and anchors the 19th-century text requirement to Section A.
Clarifies when learners should summarise and when they should synthesise across texts.
Provides a concise retrieval cue for evaluating usefulness through bias and misuse of evidence.
Reinforces the three explicitly required features learners must adapt in non-fiction writing.
Accurately distinguishes Component 02 text periods and genres from Component 01 requirements.
Builds recall of the three craft aspects learners explore when analysing reader impact.
Connects narrative organisation and structure with their required purpose: creating deliberate effects.
Reinforces conscious selection and sustained control of narrative viewpoint across a creative-writing piece.
